response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: Incorrect. The reference song was erroneously identified as 'Kowareyasuki', while the actual performance is 'Hokoritakaki Idol' by mona, followed by an outro vocal track. 2. JSON Usage: Rejected the incorrect reference and performed manual translation/transcription. 3. Timing & Pacing: Subtitles strictly timed to character vocalizations.

subtitles.original: 「なんであなたにはできないの？」
subtitles.english: "Why is it that you can't do it?"

subtitles.original: なんてさ
subtitles.english: They say things like that,

subtitles.original: 陰口言われたり
subtitles.english: being badmouthed,

subtitles.original: 呆れられたり
subtitles.english: disappointed in,

subtitles.original: 見放されたり
subtitles.english: and given up on.

subtitles.original: 電車は私を置き去りに
subtitles.english: The train leaves me behind,

subtitles.original: しちゃうし
subtitles.english: as it always does,

subtitles.original: 葉もの野菜も腐るスピード早すぎだね
subtitles.english: and leaf vegetables rot way too fast, don't they?

subtitles.original: ありのままの私を好きとかだけじゃ足りないんだ
subtitles.english: Just liking me as I am isn't enough,

subtitles.original: 愛して
subtitles.english: love me!

subtitles.original: 毎日死ぬほど頑張ってやっと
subtitles.english: Doing my absolute best every single day, just to barely...

subtitles.original: ここまで連れて来られたんだ...
subtitles.english: be able to bring myself to this point.

subtitles.original: あなたには分からない
subtitles.english: You wouldn't understand,

subtitles.original: 分かってほしくもない
subtitles.english: nor do I want you to understand.

subtitles.original: 私の苦労も
subtitles.english: Even my struggles,

subtitles.original: 何もかも何もご存知ないでいてね
subtitles.english: please go on knowing absolutely nothing of them.

subtitles.original: 「きっとあなたならできるはず」
subtitles.english: "I'm sure you can do it,"

subtitles.original: なんてさ
subtitles.english: they say.

subtitles.original: 身の程知らずにはなりたくない
subtitles.english: I don't want to be someone who doesn't know their place.

subtitles.original: それでも死ぬほど頑張って
subtitles.english: Even so, I do my absolute best,

subtitles.original: 根拠はあると思った
subtitles.english: believing I have a reason to.

subtitles.original: 投げ出したい日もあるよ
subtitles.english: There are days I want to throw it all away,

subtitles.original: でも
subtitles.english: but...

subtitles.original: 諦めたりはしない
subtitles.english: I will never give up!

subtitles.original: 私の未来も
subtitles.english: My future,

subtitles.original: 失敗も全部私だけのもの
subtitles.english: and my failures are all mine alone.

subtitles.original: あなたには分からない
subtitles.english: You wouldn't understand,

subtitles.original: 分かってほしくもない
subtitles.english: nor do I want you to understand.

subtitles.original: 私の苦労も
subtitles.english: Even my struggles,

subtitles.original: 何もかも何もご存知ないでいてね
subtitles.english: please go on knowing absolutely nothing of them.

subtitles.original: 投げ出したい日もあるよ
subtitles.english: There are days I want to throw it all away,

subtitles.original: でも
subtitles.english: but...

subtitles.original: 諦めたりはしない
subtitles.english: I will never give up!

subtitles.original: 私の未来も
subtitles.english: My future,

subtitles.original: 失敗も全部私だけのもの
subtitles.english: and my failures are all mine alone.

subtitles.original: 傷つかない 傷つかないでいて
subtitles.english: Don't get hurt, don't get hurt...

subtitles.original: 可愛いだけの私でいい
subtitles.english: Just being my cute self is enough.

subtitles.original: 三つ数えたら 素直に書いた絵
subtitles.english: When I count to three, the drawing I drew honestly

subtitles.original: 消えてしまうけど それと同じ手
subtitles.english: will disappear, but with those same hands...

subtitles.original: 君の顔ばかり 浮かべてたら
subtitles.english: If I keep picturing only your face...
